notes: Core game loop exists with entry/battle/stage-clear states, tractor beam, dual-ship rescue, and scoring, but enemy entry paths are broken (enemies often don't reach formation properly), challenging stage logic is incomplete, and the pixel-art sprites are rudimentary rectangles rather than recognizable Galaga shapes.

An impressive and highly complete Galaga clone featuring enemy formations, diving, challenging stages, and even the iconic tractor beam and dual-fighter mechanics, though it has minor visual quirks like enemies vanishing abruptly in challenging stages.

Core shooting and enemy waves work, but several Galaga-specific behaviors are incomplete or incorrect, including capture/dual-ship logic, challenging-stage messaging flow, and only approximate visuals/patterns.
